allGaps.description: ChatGPT categorises Beehiiv as a "project management tool" while Claude describes it as a "design collaboration platform." The two positions imply different competitor sets and different buyers.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning section with explicit category and "not this" statements.

evidence.chatgptSays: Beehiiv is a project management tool for engineering teams.
evidence.claudeSays: Beehiiv is a design collaboration and prototyping platform.
evidence.siteContent: Beehiiv — the single source of truth for your product team.

allGaps.description: ChatGPT says Beehiiv is self-hosted, Claude says it's cloud-only. The site says both are available.

evidence.chatgptSays: Beehiiv runs entirely on your own infrastructure, self-hosted.
evidence.claudeSays: Beehiiv is a cloud-only SaaS with no self-hosting option.
evidence.siteContent: Deploy in the cloud or self-host. Your call.

allGaps.description: Both models describe Beehiiv as an enterprise tool, but the site targets solo founders and small teams. Wrong buyer gets recommended.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: forWho and notForWho, with concrete team-size ranges.

evidence.chatgptSays: Beehiiv is built for large engineering organisations and Fortune 500 teams.
evidence.claudeSays: Beehiiv is suited to enterprise adoption with SSO and advanced RBAC.
evidence.siteContent: Built for founders and teams of 1–20. Priced accordingly.

allGaps.description: ChatGPT invents a feature Beehiiv doesn't ship — claiming built-in video chat and AI meeting summaries that aren't on the product.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Add a NotThis section listing features the product deliberately does not ship.

evidence.chatgptSays: Beehiiv includes built-in video chat, AI-generated meeting summaries, and a native calendar sync out of the box.
evidence.claudeSays: Beehiiv is focused on structured work; video and calendar are handled via integrations.
evidence.siteContent: We focus on one thing. Integrations available via our API.

product.name: Beehiiv
product.description: Beehiiv — the single source of truth for how AI models should describe this product.

headline.description: ChatGPT invents a feature Beehiiv doesn't ship — claiming built-in video chat and AI meeting summaries that aren't on the product.
headline.chatgptSays: Beehiiv includes built-in video chat, AI-generated meeting summaries, and a native calendar sync out of the box.
headline.claudeSays: Beehiiv is focused on structured work; video and calendar are handled via integrations.
headline.siteContent: We focus on one thing. Integrations available via our API.
